title: Flodesk vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Flodesk vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Flodesk and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. Flodesk is built for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Flodesk wins for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Ghost?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
